name: metabolomics
description: Computational metabolomics (predominantly LC-MS/MS; also LC-MS, GC-MS, NMR, mass-spectrometry imaging, ion mobility, lipidomics, multi-omics): spectral library matching, molecular networking, formula/structure annotation (SIRIUS), preprocessing, normalization, and statistics — 5,865 evidence-grounded skills over 909 tools, each derived from a peer-reviewed method paper. Includes a Perspicacité KB auto-grounding binder. Packaged auto-grounding (kb+local).
